final_files.tests/test_final.py:
from decimal import Decimal

from billing.allocation import allocate


def test_small_three_way_refund_uses_native_precision_and_conserves_sign():
    shares = allocate(Decimal("-0.007"), [1, 1, 1], "KWD")
    assert shares == [Decimal("-0.003"), Decimal("-0.002"), Decimal("-0.002")]
    assert sum(shares) == Decimal("-0.007")
